description.unified: Deals Physical Damage to all enemies and knocks them back. This skill is applied as a normal attack.

Deals Physical Damage 3 time to enemies in front. Each hit knocks them down for [1.2 sec->1 sec] and increases Physical Damage taken by [30%->8%] for 7 sec. This effect stacks up to [(added) 3] times.
Deals Physical Damage 5 times to a random enemy and nearby enemies, reducing their Attack Speed by [40%->12%] for [10 sec.->8 sec]. Against non-hero enemies, deals additional Physical Damage.

On Normal Attack, fires an additional projectile that deals extra Physical Damage to all enemies and increases your Attack by 0.5% for 10 sec. The Attack increase stacks up to 100 times and cannot be dispelled.

dark.unified: On hit, gains [Darkness] stacks equal to the number of enemies struck. When [Darkness] reaches 50 stacks, all [Darkness] is removed and you enter [Rampage] for 10 sec, increasing Attack Speed by [80%->48%] and Attack by [20%->25%].
